2026-07-19.line: 11am Post Carousel #1 (5 things Claude, 7 slides) to TikTok photo mode + IG
2026-07-19.caption: TikTok: What is Claude used for? 5 things you didn't know Claude could do 🔖 #Claude #AI #AITools
2026-07-19.caption_ig: 5 things you didn't know Claude AI could do 🤯 Save this + send #2 to your friend who codes everything by hand. #Claude #AI #AITools #Productivity
2026-07-19.tip: On TikTok add a trending calm/lofi background sound to the photo post, it boosts reach.

2026-07-19.line: 12pm Post X article #1 (5 things Claude) + header image
2026-07-19.tip: Copy the article + attach the '5 Things' header image from our Claude chat. Stay 10 min for replies.
Record ALL screen captures first (PDF, app build, spreadsheet, emails, prompt comparisons, trades estimate), then all face clips in one sitting.

2026-07-20.line: 1pm Post Quick Video A 'What is Anthropic' to TikTok + IG + YouTube Shorts
2026-07-20.hook: Over 90 thousand people googled what is Anthropic this week. Here's the answer in 35 seconds.
2026-07-20.caption: TikTok: What is Anthropic? The company behind Claude, explained in 35 seconds. Everyone is searching this right now 🔎 #Anthropic #Claude #AI #TechTok
2026-07-20.caption_ig: What is Anthropic and why is everyone suddenly searching it? The Claude company, explained fast. Send this to your group chat. #Anthropic #Claude #AI
2026-07-20.tip: One take, face to camera. Say 'what is Anthropic' in the first 3 seconds. YouTube title: 'What is Anthropic? Explained in 35 Seconds' #Shorts

2026-07-20.line: Optional if time: film tomorrow's 1Password video (one take talking head)
2026-07-20.tip: Filming ahead by one day keeps posting stress free. Skip if today is packed.

2026-07-21.line: 9am Post LinkedIn PDF carousel (5 Things Claude deck)
2026-07-21.tip: Upload the PDF from our chat as a document post, 8 to 10am window. Caption is in chat too. PDFs get big dwell time on LinkedIn.
Article #2 + 'Claude Can Now Log Into Your Accounts' image from chat. No filming needed, just paste.

2026-07-21.line: 1pm Film + post Video 2 'Claude logs into accounts' to TikTok + IG + YouTube Shorts
2026-07-21.hook: Claude can now log into your accounts for you. And no, that's not a hack, it's official.
2026-07-21.caption: Claude can now use your 1Password logins, what is Anthropic even building? AI that actually DOES things is here. Would you trust it? #Claude #AI #TechNews #Anthropic
2026-07-21.tip: One take talking head, your fastest format. End on the question, comment debates are fuel. This is the only filming today.

2026-07-22.line: BATCH FILM DAY: 7 videos, all fresh (skill news first, it posts 1pm today)
2026-07-22.tip: Order: skill news, privacy settings, jobs take (talking heads), then screen demos: slides (posts 3pm today), browser experiment, 60 second app build, morning AI workflow. Change shirts between talking heads.

2026-07-22.line: 1pm Post NEWS 'Teach Claude a skill by showing it' to TikTok + IG + YouTube Shorts
2026-07-22.hook: Anthropic dropped something this morning: you can now teach Claude Cowork a skill by literally showing it. I write code for a living, and this still stopped me.
2026-07-22.caption: TikTok: Claude skills just changed the game: teach Claude a skill by recording your screen ONCE 🤯 New from Anthropic this morning. What would you teach it first? #Claude #ClaudeSkills #ClaudeCowork #AI #TechNews
2026-07-22.caption_ig: You can now TEACH Claude skills by showing it your screen once 🤯 Dropped this morning. Send this to someone who does the same task every single day. #Claude #AI #Anthropic #TechNews
2026-07-22.tip: Say 'Claude skills' out loud early, 209K searches for that exact phrase. Overlay the @claudeai announcement screenshot + Record a skill UI. Cover text: Teach Claude by showing it. YouTube title: 'You Can Now Teach Claude Skills by Showing It' #Shorts

2026-07-22.line: 3pm Post 'Claude designed my slides' to TikTok + IG + YouTube Shorts
2026-07-22.hook: My last presentation took me three hours to build. This one took one sentence. Watch Claude design slides in real time.
2026-07-22.caption: TikTok: Claude design slides: one sentence in, a full presentation out 🤯 2 minutes, no PowerPoint skills. Save this for your next one 🔖 #Claude #ClaudeSlides #AI #AITools #Productivity
2026-07-22.caption_ig: Claude built my entire presentation from one sentence 🤯 Save this and send it to the coworker who formats slides for hours. #Claude #AI #Productivity #AITools
2026-07-22.tip: Say 'Claude design slides' in the first 3 seconds: 2.17M searches, up 905%, almost no supply. Screen record: one prompt, flip through the finished deck, react. Cover text: Claude designed my slides. YouTube title: 'I Let Claude Design My Slides' #Shorts

2026-07-23.caption: The ChatGPT psychology prompt everyone's searching 🧠 Full prompt is on slide 2, save this. Rate yours 1 to 10 below. #ChatGPT #AI #Prompts
2026-07-23.tip: Thursday morning is Instagram's weekly peak, don't post this late.

2026-07-23.line: 3pm Post 'I let Claude use my browser for a day' to TikTok + IG + YouTube Shorts

2026-07-24.line: 1pm Post 'Watch me build an app in 60 seconds' to TikTok + IG + YouTube Shorts
2026-07-24.hook: One sentence. That's all it takes to build a working app in 2026. Don't believe me? Time me.
2026-07-24.caption: TikTok: Software developer builds a working app with ONE sentence 🤯 60 seconds, no code. Comment an app idea, I'll build the best one. #AI #Claude #BuildWithAI #NoCode #SoftwareDeveloper
2026-07-24.caption_ig: I built a working app with one sentence, timed 🤯 Comment an app idea and I'll build the best one next week. #AI #NoCode #BuildWithAI #SoftwareDeveloper
2026-07-24.tip: Timer overlay on screen the whole time. The comment an app idea CTA generates next week's video. Cover text: app in 60 seconds

2026-07-24.line: 3pm Post 'My exact 4 minute AI morning routine' to TikTok + IG + YouTube Shorts
2026-07-24.hook: This is my exact AI setup every morning before work, and it takes four minutes.

2026-07-25.line: 10am Post X article #4 (Claude for business) + header image
11am Post 'AI won't take your job. But...' to TikTok + IG + YouTube Shorts
2026-07-25.hook: AI is not going to take your job. But I watched what happened at my job this year, and you need to hear this.
2026-07-25.caption: TikTok: AI won't take your job. Someone using AI will. A software developer's honest take. Agree? #AI #Jobs #Career #ArtificialIntelligence #TechTok
2026-07-25.caption_ig: AI won't take your job. Someone using AI will 😬 My honest take as a software developer. Agree or disagree? #AI #Jobs #Career #TechTok
2026-07-25.tip: Debate bait, defend your take in comments all day, Saturday scrollers love a fight. Cover text: AI and your job, real talk. Saturday midday is TikTok's best window.
